programmes.show_description: Belly Of The Beast. Extraction is on the other side of the island, but the sea is risky to cross. If they trek through the jungle, they might meet poisonous vipers and centipedes. S4, Ep5
No Hand-Outs. Tensions start to rise between teams as they get territorial over hunting ground. Plus, one survivalist is bitten by a snake and requires urgent medical attention. S4, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Return To Jamestown, NY. The crew return to Jamestown to hunt for items at a home that's been expanded to create a Moose Lodge. They uncover neon lights and ornate roofing tiles. S11, Ep2
North Carolina Pick And Haul. In North Carolina, the crew search for items at a Mediterranean-style mansion. They salvage stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers. S11, Ep3
Rock Bottom. Approaching the midpoint of the season, it's sink or swim for the Nome dredging fleet. Meanwhile, Shawn is hoping for an unlikely partnership with Zeke. S5, Ep11
Breaking Point. A lack of gold has everyone on edge and Steve's refusal to let Shawn go to Bluff causes war between father and son. Plus, Emily gets news that could end her season. S5, Ep12
One team breaks all records, unearthing the biggest gold nugget ever found on television. Neville and Mick are hampered by a run-in with one of the deadliest snakes on the planet. S4, Ep3
Croc Witchcraft. Forrest heads to Africa's Zambezi River, where crocodile attacks plague a village. He teams up with an old friend to stop the killings and save the croc. S1, Ep2
Empty Throne. Skipper Phil Harris is airlifted to hospital in Anchorage and his son Josh is torn between catching the rest of their crab quota and his father's bedside. S6, Ep12
Cain And Abel. The fleet is beset by crisis. Skipper Phil fights for his life as his sons fight each other, and sick of false promises, Captain Sig's brother thinks of quitting. S6, Ep13
Treasure Found! The team finds proof of treasure in the jungle near a historic mission. A spooky visit to an antique market uncovers Jesuit silver, leading them up a perilous river. S2, Ep3
Finding Fenn's Fortune. Josh joins the hunt for a $2-million treasure. He tries to decode the clues to its location by following a cryptic poem, leading him into the Rocky Mountains. S2, Ep5
Genghis Khan's Tomb. Josh Gates journeys into the heart of Mongolia in search of the fabled lost tomb of Genghis Khan. He examines historical evidence, facts and myths. S2, Ep6
Fury And Fire. Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a solution to their failing Idaho homestead. But, Stuart opposes the Raneys' fire-proofing plans. S2, Ep7
Line Of Fire. A homestead in danger of a raging California wildfire prompts Marty to clear cut surrounding trees and create an evacuation ark for the Grants' livestock. S2, Ep8
Scotty gets lost while exploring hidden tunnels on the Bishop's massive claim. Jack and Mickey are nearly crushed as the Tarantos try to move their machinery. S5, Ep12
The Bushmen attempt drilling for the first time with a 50-year-old exploration rig. Plus, the Mooka Boys go on a treasure hunt in a scorpion-riddled mine. S5, Ep13
Fire At Sea: Part 1. Alone on the water, days from land, the Northwestern catches fire. On the Time Bandit, a family emergency forces Johnathan to make a desperate move. S12, Ep13
Fire At Sea: Part 2. Alone on the water, days from land, the Northwestern catches fire. On the Time Bandit, a family emergency forces Johnathan to make a desperate move. S12, Ep14
The Beast Of Bray Road. Josh, Jess and Phil are looking for a werewolf-like creature in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts have led them on their quest to a remote forest. S2, Ep10
The Secret. Adventurer and avid explorer, Josh Gates, travels all over America to investigate the mystery of the 1980s bestseller and cult phenomenon, The Secret. S4, Ep1
Jacqui and Andrew are stranded in the dangerous tropical wilderness of the Palmer River region. Meanwhile, the Poseidon Crew face a critical meeting. S7, Ep4
Hike Into Hell. Three of the remaining teams trek through the dense, snake-filled jungle. The journey quickly turns to chaos and one survivalist must be medically evacuated. S4, Ep7
Jeff's Worst Nightmare. With the extraction day looming, two more critical survivalists struggle. Plus, Jeff changes strategy but a medical emergency stops him in his tracks. S4, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Maryland Strip Mall. The crew rescue items from a sporting goods shop in Largo, Maryland. Robert and Grayson face a challenge to salvage the property's electrical system. S11, Ep4
Last Trip To Cap Center. The crew focus on salvaging exterior items from the sporting goods shop in Largo, Maryland. Later, they repurpose a box of old farm equipment. S11, Ep5
Teamwork. Emily swallows her pride and offers ex-friend Zeke a job on the Eroica. Plus, Derek runs into trouble while dredging in a gold-rich area and begrudgingly sends out an SOS. S5, Ep13
Turf War. The Kellys face off against Zeke's corporate dredge in a bitter gold war. Meanwhile, Derek plots to invade Shawn's gold-rich spots when he's gone. S5, Ep14
The Gypsies strike a patch of gold but are distracted when thieves raid their nearby lease. Meanwhile, torrential rain disrupts production for the Dirt Dogs. S4, Ep4
The Lake Chelan Dragon. Forrest and zoologist Jessica explore the myth of a lake monster in Lake Chelan. A deep dive reveals scales from what may be the real-life legend. S1, Ep3
Redemption Day. On the Time Bandit, Scott steps up to challenge Mike for the Captain's spot. But all skipper Andy sees is his deck start to disintegrate. S6, Ep14
Valhalla. Captain Phil sadly loses his fight for life while the fleet are out battling a massive storm. But once they find out they celebrate his life - crabber style! S6, Ep15
Brush With Death. A deadly caiman targets Mehgan, but a potentially crippling accident leads to a shocking find - a coded message from the past that may bring them closer to gold. S2, Ep4
Japan's Atlantis. Josh Gates travels to remote Yonaguni Island and dives into the waters of the Pacific Rim to explore an underwater phenomenon described as Japan's Atlantis. S2, Ep7
True Cross Of Christ. Explorer Josh Gates journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul searching for lost pieces of the cross from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ. S2, Ep8
Wisconsin Washout. The homestead of musician Lou and partner Stacey is threatened by water erosion and at serious risk from a torrential rainstorm. The Raneys come to the rescue. S2, Ep9
High Country Bear Lair. The Counters moved to a remote plot in Colorado for much-needed tranquillity. But two years in, their crops are failing, and their teenage kids are bored. S2, Ep10
The Young Guns rethink their black opal hunt when they face impenetrable mine walls. The Blacklighters' ambitious plan is threatened as their generator dies. S5, Ep14
The Bushmen discover a hidden shaft by falling straight down into it. The Young Guns are forced to undertake emergency repairs halfway down a mine shaft. S5, Ep15
Blood & Guts. Winter rages on. There's bloodshed on the Time Bandit, a fight breaks out on the Wizard and a lost bet leads to cod guts on the Brenna A. S12, Ep15
Life Or Death Decision. A rogue wave forces Zack to make a life-or-death decision. Meanwhile, Josh bets on a Bering Sea myth, and Sig turns to daughter Mandy for help. S12, Ep16
The air ambulance airlifts a driver with nasty leg injuries and a woman who's been knocked unconscious after a fall. S2, Ep5
A boy is airlifted after a beach fall and a motorcyclist battles to breathe. Plus, the crew face a tricky landing as they respond to a patient in cardiac arrest. S2, Ep6
Winter storms ravage the Gold Retrievers' new $35,000 dry blower and could end their season. Meanwhile, the pressure to find gold could tear the Ferals apart. S7, Ep5
